---
title: "Aunt Charlotte's Stories of Roman History for the little ones"
slug: "Aunt_Roman"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


**Online text of*Aunt Charlotte's Stories of Roman History***

[Click here to reach the latest version of*Aunt Charlotte's Stories of Roman History*  
online from Gutenberg](http://www.gutenberg.org/files/16667/16667-h/16667-h.htm)

(Many thanks to Juliet Sutherland, Graeme Mackreth  
and the Gutenberg Online Distributed Proofreading Team )

**Publishers preface to H.A. Guerber's*The Story of the Romans***

Click here to read the**[publishers preface to H.A. Guerber's*The Story of the Romans*](http://www.nothingnewpress.com/guerber/romans-preface2.html)**  
(Christine Miller /[Nothing New Press](http://www.nothingnewpress.com/index.html)).

This preface refers to Yonge's earlier Stories and offers a useful historical background to both books.
